title: Arctic Hayes Certex Anti-Bacterial Handwash 500ml
features: Anti-bacterial hand wash kills 99.9 percent of germs
Hydrating fast foaming formula for frequent everyday use
It is gentle on skin leaving hands refreshed
Protect your hands in one single wash
Ideal for commercial, hotels, restaurants and home use
description: From the manufacturer PROTECTIVE FACK MASKS Helps to reduce the spread of the viruses. Guards against droplets that enter/ leave through your mouth and nose. HAND SANITISERS, SPRAYS & STATIONS Keep yourself, your employees and customers safe with these hand sanitising stations & products. WIPES View the full range of wipes, keeping yourself, your employees and customers safe. SOCIAL DISTANCING SIGNAGE Keep yourself, your employees and customers safe with the social distancing signage range. PIPE FREEZING Freeze pipes without the need to drain down the system SMOKE PRODUCTS Smoke products for the testing of heating and ventilation systems. AEROSOLS, GREASE & SOLUTIONS Aerosols, Grease & solution products for plumbing and heating engineers. CARBON MONOXIDE & SMOKE DETECTION Carbon Monoxide & Smoke Detection products for protection against Carbon Monoxide & Smoke. SERVICING ESSENTIALS Essential engineer's servicing essentials for all types of jobs. SERVICING TOOLS Premium quality tools designed to make the job easier. TESTING EQUIPMENT For all your Gas, Pressure, Temperature and Electrical testing needs. PERSONAL PROTECTIVE EQUIPMENT High quality personal protective equipment keeping the work place safe and compliant.
